## X-Sense Home Security v1.2.6.34

### 🎥 Camera WebRTC
- Creates the camera peer connection and data channel after PEER_IN, matching the Android app order before sending the SDP offer.

### 🔎 Debug Logging
- Keeps the camera startup trace focused on the ticket, PEER_IN, SDP offer, ICE candidates, and PEER_OUT/answer state for camera prerelease testing.
